    S

    searchForJudge(String) - Method in class controller.Controller
    Cerca il giudice nella lista dei giudici iscritti.
    searchForUserInRoles(User) - Method in class controller.Controller
    Cerca il ruolo assegnato all'utente della piattaforma specificato.
    setCurrentHackathon(Hackathon) - Method in class model.Location
    Sets current hackathon.
    setEndDate(LocalDate) - Method in class model.Hackathon
    Sets end date.
    setHackathonStatus(boolean) - Method in class model.Hackathon
    Sets hackathon status.
    setInvitesList(ArrayList<Invite>) - Method in class model.Judge
    Sets invites list.
    setPassword(String) - Method in class model.User
    Sets password.
    setProblemDescription(String) - Method in class model.Hackathon
    Sets problem description.
    setRegistrationStatus(boolean) - Method in class model.Hackathon
    Sets registration status.
    setStartDate(LocalDate) - Method in class model.Hackathon
    Sets start date.
    setTeam(Team) - Method in class model.Participant
    Sets team.
    setUsername(String) - Method in class model.User
    Sets username.
    subscribeToHackathon(Hackathon) - Method in class model.User
    Iscrive l'utente ad un hackathon.
    subscribeUserToHackathon(String) - Method in class controller.Controller
    Iscrive l'utente chiamante all'hackathon specificato.
